sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61986" key="laruggiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾰρυγγ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n61986.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gluttonous</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
